candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; populated version matches Net Sales numerically and is the best candidate from the provided list.
Revenue-related but non-GAAP, so less preferred than reported revenue.
Balance sheet liability, not top-line revenue.

variables.notes: Chose the reported revenue label from the candidate list. Although 'Net Sales' is also present and populated, 'Total Revenue' is the preferred candidate and appropriate as the primary revenue line.

candidates.why: Direct COGS label and populated across years.
Also a direct COGS label, but appears duplicative of 'Cost of sales'.
Inventory component, not income statement COGS expense.

variables.notes: Selected the standard direct-cost line and avoided duplicate equivalent label 'Cost of revenues/COGS' to prevent double counting.

candidates.why: Explicit SG&A row, populated, and the best overhead bucket.
Separate above-EBIT R&D line; include as well so XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD yields SG&A excluding R&D.
Operating overhead-like, but more miscellaneous and not needed when explicit SG&A exists.
Could be overhead-related, but likely already embedded in operating expenses and using it risks double counting.
Semantically relevant but unpopulated/duplicate-style label versus explicit SG&A row.

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A exists and is populated, so it is selected. Added separate above-EBIT R&D per the rule so that PROF can subtract XRD and obtain SG&A excluding R&D. Excluded 'Other operating expenses' and 'Share-based payment' to avoid overreach/double counting.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line above operating profit; ideal XRD mapping.
Tax credit adjustment, not the core R&D expense line.
Amortization, not current-period R&D expense; also excluded from SG&A components rules.
Depreciation component, not pure R&D expense.

variables.notes: Selected the dedicated above-EBIT R&D expense line.

candidates.why: Primary recurring interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring financing cost and should be included with interest expense.
Broader total that includes non-interest items; less preferred than granular components.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of lease interest expense; avoid double counting.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Used granular recurring finance cost components and avoided broader 'Financial expenses' because it includes non-interest items. Excluded the supplemental lease-interest row as a duplicate.

candidates.why: Best equity line that excludes non-controlling interests, as confirmed because 'Total equity' equals this plus NCI.
Would include NCI and risk double counting with MIB.
Semantically relevant but not populated in preview; less preferable than explicit total line.

variables.notes: Preferred owner equity excluding NCI. 'Total equity' was not selected because MIB is separately mapped.

candidates.why: Direct balance sheet NCI line; best match for minority interest.
Equivalent alternative label, appears duplicative of NCI.
Income statement profit allocation, not balance sheet minority equity.

variables.notes: Selected the balance sheet minority equity line and avoided duplicate equivalent label 'Minority Interest'.
